top_signals.title: Oil traders warn market is close to running on empty as Hormuz shuts again
top_signals.summary: Stockpiles that acted as shock absorbers early in Iran war are running low as crucial waterway closes again
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Modi Pushes to Cut Import Reliance to Shield India From Shocks
top_signals.summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi is taking steps to reduce key imports into the economy in order to protect supply chains and ease pressure on the currency as geopolitical risks escalate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix shares plunge 10% as Asia sees tech rout, tracking U.S. chip losses
top_signals.summary: Asian semiconductor stocks tumbled on Thursday as a selloff in U.S. chipmakers spilled into the region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
